query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A black and white image where a large dark area occupies the right foreground, while lighter rectangular regions appear in the left and upper background amid smooth tonal gradations of gray and black.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely blurred and softened black and white photograph where intentional lack of focus and absent fine detail render the scene abstract; a dark silhouetted mass fills the right foreground while vague rectangular light sources appear behind it, creating smeared tonal transitions with no discernible texture or sharp edges.
